'''wathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualifiably|qualifiably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualifiably|qualifiably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wathate|wathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wathatesher|wathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathatesherĂ«m|wathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wathatero|wathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wathateshĂ«|wathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathateshĂ«m|wathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwathatero|gokiwathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwathateshĂ«|gokiwathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwathateshĂ«m|gokiwathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowathankerom|gowathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowathankeshĂ«|gowathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowathankeshĂ«m|gowathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowathankeya|gowathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wathaterom|wathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathatemu|wathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wathateya|wathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwathaterom|gokiwathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwathatemu|gokiwathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwathateya|gokiwathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wathathate|wathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wathathatesher|wathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathathatesherĂ«m|wathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wathathatero|wathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wathathateshĂ«|wathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathathateshĂ«m|wathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwathathatero|gokiwathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwathathateshĂ«|gokiwathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwathathateshĂ«m|gokiwathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowathathankerom|gowathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowathathankeshĂ«|gowathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowathathankeshĂ«m|gowathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowathathankeya|gowathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wathathaterom|wathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wathathatemu|wathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wathathateya|wathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwathathaterom|gokiwathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwathathatemu|gokiwathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwathathateya|gokiwathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠte|wĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠtesher|wĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠtero|wĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠterom|wĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠtemu|wĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠthĂŠteya|wĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠthĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafthafte|wafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafthaftesher|wafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafthaftesherĂ«m|wafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafthaftero|wafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafthafteshĂ«|wafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafthafteshĂ«m|wafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafthaftero|gokiwafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafthafteshĂ«|gokiwafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafthafteshĂ«m|gokiwafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafthafnkerom|gowafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafthafnkeshĂ«|gowafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafthafnkeshĂ«m|gowafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafthafnkeya|gowafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafthafterom|wafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafthaftemu|wafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafthafteya|wafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafthafterom|gokiwafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafthaftemu|gokiwafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafthafteya|gokiwafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
